prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document describes actions related to education policy and funding intricacies pertinent to England's Department for Education, specifically referencing maintained schools and academies in England. Therefore, it does not apply to Scotland, which has its own distinct education system and governing body.
